message:
Rename Package Management guides section to Packages

Update the guides section label and directory structure from
"package-management" to "packages" for consistency. Also update
13 cross-document links referencing this section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 pull request numbers, and creation dates. See the guide for [maintaining a
-changelog](/guides/package-management/maintain-a-changelog) to learn how to add
+changelog](/guides/packages/maintain-a-changelog) to learn how to add
 entries and create releases.

 ### Step 4: Install and use the package

-it](/guides/package-management/install-a-package), either interactively via
+it](/guides/packages/install-a-package), either interactively via
 [`package::add`](/reference/operators/package/add), or IaC-style by putting it
 into a git repo and pointing the config option `tenzir.package-dirs` to it.
